title: Intel to report Q2 earnings as chip stocks bounce off recent losses
excerpt: Intel will report its Q2 earnings after the bell on Thursday.
content_html:
Intel (INTC) will report its second quarter earnings after the bell on Thursday, after the Philadelphia Semiconductor Index (^SOX) fell into a bear market last week following a run-up in shares of semiconductor stocks over the past few months.

On Tuesday, Intel confirmed it will lay off employees in its data center business, sending shares higher.

"As part of our broader strategy to become a more focused and efficient company, Intel's Data Center Group (DCG) is aligning its organization to ensure it has the right roles and skills in place to position the business for long-term success," an Intel spokesperson told Yahoo Finance.

"We are committed to treating all impacted employees with respect and providing resources to support them through this transition," they added.

Intel stock has rocketed since the start of the year, rising 178% as CEO Lip-Bu Tan continues an aggressive turnaround effort. The company has also benefited from investments by the Trump administration and Nvidia (NVDA), as well as an increased emphasis on central processing units (CPUs) as the tech industry turns toward AI agents. 

Agents use CPUs to perform tasks such as combing through databases or creating documents. That has made the once-downtrodden chip far more popular after years of playing second fiddle to graphics processing units (GPUs).

"[Intel] is positioned to support 25-30% server CPU unit growth in 2026, benefitting from expanded capacity at [Intel] 3, robust demand from hyperscale and AI [infrastructure] deployments, and agentic AI increasing CPU intensity of AI clusters," KeyBanc Capital Markets' John Vinh wrote in a note to investors ahead of Intel's earnings.

Intel has also benefited from reports that its foundry business is beginning to sign on big-name customers. According to The Information, Google (GOOG, GOOGL) has placed an order with Intel to produce 3 million of its custom Tensor Processing Units.

The report said Nvidia is also looking into Intel as an option.

The moves come as Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co. (TSM) struggles to keep up with the immense demand from clients, including Nvidia, AMD (AMD), Apple (AAPL), and others, amid the AI boom. That gives Intel a prime opportunity to slide in as a secondary chip manufacturer to pick up the slack.

For the quarter, Intel is expected to report adjusted earnings per share (EPS) of $0.21 on revenue of $14.43 billion, up from the -$0.10 per share and $12.86 billion in revenue the company saw in the same period last year.

Intel's Data Center and AI segment is anticipated to generate $5.54 billion in the quarter, up 40% year over year. Intel's foundry business is expected to generate $5.48 billion in revenue.

sentences.zh: 预计英特尔本季度调整后每股收益 (EPS) 为 0.21 美元，营收为 144.3 亿美元，高于去年同期的每股 - 0.10 美元和营收 128.6 亿美元。

sentences.en: Intel's Data Center and AI segment is anticipated to generate $5.54 billion in the quarter, up 40% year over year.
sentences.zh: 英特尔数据中心和人工智能部门预计本季度营收 55.4 亿美元，同比增长 40%。

sentences.en: Intel's foundry business is expected to generate $5.48 billion in revenue.
sentences.zh: 英特尔的代工业务预计将产生54.8亿美元的收入。

content_html_zh:
英特尔（INTC）将于周四盘后公布第二季度财报，此前费城半导体指数（^SOX）在过去几个月半导体股票上涨后陷入熊市。

周二，英特尔确认将裁员数据中心业务员工，推动股价走高。

英特尔发言人告诉雅虎财经：“作为我们成为一家更加专注和高效的公司的更广泛战略的一部分，英特尔数据中心集团（DCG）正在调整其组织，以确保其拥有合适的角色和技能，以确保业务取得长期成功。”

他们补充说：“我们致力于尊重所有受影响的员工，并提供资源支持他们完成这一过渡。”

由于首席执行官陈立武 (Lip-Bu Tan) 继续积极推动扭亏为盈，英特尔股价自今年年初以来一路飙升，上涨了 178%。 该公司还受益于特朗普政府和英伟达（NVDA）的投资，以及随着科技行业转向人工智能代理而对中央处理器（CPU）的日益重视。

代理使用 CPU 来执行诸如梳理数据库或创建文档等任务。 这使得曾经一度受到压制的芯片在多年来一直屈居图形处理单元（GPU）之后变得更加受欢迎。

KeyBanc Capital Markets 的 John Vinh 在英特尔发布财报之前给投资者的一份报告中写道：“受益于 [英特尔] 3 产能的扩大、超大规模和人工智能 [基础设施] 部署的强劲​​需求，以及代理人工智能增加人工智能集群的 CPU 强度，[英特尔] 预计将在 2026 年支持服务器 CPU 单元增长 25-30%。”

英特尔还受益于有关其代工业务开始与大牌客户签约的报道。 据 The Information 报道，谷歌（GOOG，GOOGL）已向英特尔下了订单，生产 300 万个定制张量处理单元。

报道称，英伟达也在考虑将英特尔作为一个选择。

这些举措是台积电推出的。 在人工智能热潮中，台积电 (TSM) 难以满足包括英伟达、AMD (AMD)、苹果 (AAPL) 等客户的巨大需求。 这为英特尔提供了一个绝佳的机会，可以作为二级芯片制造商来填补这一空缺。

预计英特尔本季度调整后每股收益 (EPS) 为 0.21 美元，营收为 144.3 亿美元，高于去年同期的每股 - 0.10 美元和营收 128.6 亿美元。

英特尔数据中心和人工智能部门预计本季度营收 55.4 亿美元，同比增长 40%。 英特尔的代工业务预计将产生54.8亿美元的收入。
